note: Auto-generated with full schemas from tool decorators. Do not edit manually.

tools.description: Returns detailed information for a single camera including firmware, IP address, MAC, mic/speaker settings, IR/HDR mode, stream channels, smart detection types, and PTZ capability. Use to inspect one camera.
tools.name: protect_get_camera

tools.description: Returns motion and smart detection analytics for a camera including current detection state, last-detected timestamps for each type (person, vehicle, animal, etc.), and zone counts. For historical events, use the events API tools.
tools.name: protect_get_camera_analytics

tools.description: Returns RTSP/RTSPS stream URLs for a camera organized by channel (High, Medium, Low). Includes resolution, FPS, and bitrate for each stream. Use to connect a video player or integration to camera feeds.
tools.name: protect_get_camera_streams

tools.description: Returns firmware update availability for the NVR and all adopted devices (cameras, lights, sensors, viewers, chimes, bridges, doorlocks). Use to check whether any device needs a firmware update.
tools.name: protect_get_firmware_status

tools.description: Returns NVR health summary including CPU load and temperature, memory usage, and storage utilization. Use to diagnose performance issues or storage pressure.
tools.name: protect_get_health

tools.description: Fetches a JPEG snapshot from a camera. When include_image is True, returns the image as a base64-encoded string. When False (default), returns a reference URL. Optionally specify width and height to resize.
tools.name: protect_get_snapshot

tools.description: Returns NVR model, firmware version, uptime, storage usage, and connected device counts. Use for basic 'is the NVR healthy?' checks and capacity overview.
tools.name: protect_get_system_info

tools.description: Lists all cameras adopted by the Protect NVR with their name, model, connection state, recording mode, and whether they are currently recording. Use to get an overview of all cameras in the system.
tools.name: protect_list_cameras

tools.description: Lists all connected Protect viewers (e.g., UP-Viewer, Viewport) with their connection state, firmware version, and assigned liveview.
tools.name: protect_list_viewers

tools.description: Adjusts PTZ camera position. Currently only zoom level is supported via the API. For pan/tilt, use protect_ptz_preset to move to a saved preset position. Only works on PTZ-capable cameras.
tools.name: protect_ptz_move

tools.description: Moves a PTZ camera to a saved preset position by slot number. Returns available presets for the camera. Only works on PTZ-capable cameras.
tools.name: protect_ptz_preset

tools.description: Reboots a camera. The camera will be temporarily unavailable during reboot. Requires confirm=True to execute. Use with caution — active recordings will be interrupted.
tools.name: protect_reboot_camera

tools.description: Enables or disables recording on a camera. When enabled, sets recording mode to 'always'. When disabled, sets to 'never'. Requires confirm=True to apply.
tools.name: protect_toggle_recording

tools.description: Updates camera settings such as IR LED mode, HDR mode, mic/speaker volume, status light, and motion detection. Requires confirm=True to apply. Supported keys: ir_led_mode, hdr_mode, mic_enabled, mic_volume, status_light_on, speaker_volume, name, motion_detection.
tools.name: protect_update_camera_settings
